demographics.living_situation: lives at home with his wife in a two-storey house

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lower back has been aching for weeks, but tonight the pain became unbearable, and when I tried to stand up both my legs completely gave way. (Spoken with his wife on the line, who says he's now stuck in bed and can't move his legs.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The back pain suddenly got much worse a couple of hours ago and now my legs won't hold me up — I can't get out of bed.

symptom_narrative.onset: the back ache crept in over the last few months; tonight, about two hours ago, the pain suddenly became much worse and then my legs gave out
symptom_narrative.duration: weeks of aching, but the severe pain and leg weakness are only a couple of hours old
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, constant, gnawing ache in the lower back that has never really let up; tonight it turned sharp and unbearable
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the ache was bad for weeks but tonight it's the worst pain I've had — and my legs feel like jelly and won't work
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low in the back and across the pelvis; the weakness is in both legs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there most of the time for weeks, then a sudden big jump tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I took paracetamol and some ibuprofen and it did absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to move or stand — that's when my legs gave way and I fell back onto the bed
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been losing weight without trying — about 6 kg; and both my legs feel weak and a bit numb; I haven't wet or soiled myself
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had trouble with my waterworks for about six months — trouble getting started, a weak stream and getting up a lot at night — but I just put that down to old age
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand or walk at all now; I'm stuck flat in bed and my wife had to make this call for me

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: trouble passing urine for about six months — hesitancy, weak stream, up several times a night
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: not formally diagnosed; put down to getting older
past_medical_history.how_managed: not treated — never had it checked

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some tonight for the pain
took some tonight for the pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with his wife in a two-storey home; the bedroom he can reach is on the ground floor; his wife is present and worried he cannot be moved safely

objective_data_offered.value: he looks pale and anxious and is lying flat and very still in bed, saying it hurts too much to move
his wife says when he tried to stand both legs buckled and he fell back onto the bed, and he now cannot lift or move his legs or bear any weight
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's observation, not a formal power assessment

objective_data_offered.value: his wife says his legs feel numb to him and he keeps saying they feel like jelly
